nasb.text: “Speak to Aaron, saying, ‘No man of your offspring throughout their generations who has a defect shall approach to offer the food of his God.

esv.text: “Speak to Aaron, saying, None of your offspring throughout their generations who has a blemish may approach to offer the bread of his God.

cnv.text: “你要告訴亞倫：你世世代代的後裔中，有殘疾的，就不可走近來獻他　神的食物。

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉亚伦。 “你的子孙中，任何有残疾的人都不可前来献他上帝的食物，这是世世代代都要遵守的律例。
